TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Klaus_Iohannis, title = Klaus_Iohannis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Klaus_Iohannis} }

S.FORM: I 1959 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 13 a romi'ad masofoc ci Klaus Werner Iohannis , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Romania anini i ci Klaus Iohannis, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 21 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i k…ĺao~u~us w…ôrn…ôr io~uńßannis , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ro~umania anini i ¶i k…ĺao~u~us io~uńßannis, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1959 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 13 a romi'ad masofoc ci Klaus Werner Iohannis , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Romania anini i ci Klaus Iohannis, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 21 a romi'ad.
